Query
  Pipeline
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call p50
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias p50
        Agg
          Call p90
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias p90
        Agg
          Call p99
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias p99
        Agg
          Call avg
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias avg_dur
